# 👋 About Me

## 张旭 (ZhangXu)

**PhD Candidate in Robotics**  
*Tianjin University, Tianjin, China*

---

## 📧 Contact

- **Email**: [tju_zhangxu@tju.edu.cn](mailto:tju_zhangxu@tju.edu.cn)
- **GitHub**: [@Prologue-Z](https://github.com/Prologue-Z)
- **Google Scholar**: [My Profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oEPuCTIAAAAJ)

---

## 🎓 Education

### PhD Candidate in Robotics  
**Tianjin University**, Tianjin, China  
*2022 - Expected 2026*

- **Research Focus**: Continuum Robots, Reinforcement Learning, Motion Planning
- **Advisor**: [待补充]

### [Master/Bachelor Degree]  
**[University Name]**, [Location]  
*[Year] - [Year]*

- **Major**: [Your Major]

---

## 🔬 Research Interests

- **Continuum Robotics**: Modeling, control, and motion planning for soft/continuum robots
- **Reinforcement Learning**: Deep RL for robotic manipulation and locomotion
- **Motion Planning**: Trajectory optimization, collision avoidance in constrained environments
- **Robot Learning**: Sim-to-real transfer, imitation learning

---

## 💻 Technical Skills

### Programming Languages
- **Python**: PyTorch, TensorFlow, NumPy, OpenCV
- **C++**: ROS, PCL, Open3D
- **MATLAB**: Control systems, simulation

### Simulation & Tools
- **MuJoCo**: Physics simulation for robotics
- **Gazebo**: Robot simulation
- **PyBullet**: Physics engine
- **ROS/ROS2**: Robot operating system

### Frameworks & Libraries
- **Deep Learning**: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Stable Baselines3
- **Control**: CasADi, ACADO, CVXPY
- **Visualization**: Matplotlib, Plotly

---

# 🏆 Honors & Awards

---

## 🎓 Scholarships

### **National Scholarship for Graduate Students** | *2025*
- Ministry of Education, China
- Top 2% of graduate students nationwide
- Award Amount: 30,000 CNY

### **Tianjin University Outstanding Student Scholarship** | *2024*
- Tianjin University
- 10 recipients selected from 500+ students
- Award Amount: 10,000 CNY

### **Tianjin University First-Class Scholarship** | *2023*
- Tianjin University
- Top 5% academic performance
- Award Amount: 5,000 CNY

---

## 🏅 Competition Awards

### **China Robot Competition - Continuum Robot Challenge** | *2025*
- **Award**: First Prize (Gold Medal)
- **Project**: Continuum Robot Basketball Shooting
- **Role**: Team Leader
- **Location**: Beijing, China
- **Description**: Led team of 4 to develop RL-based control system for continuum robot, achieved highest accuracy in competition.

### **IEEE ICRA Robot Challenge** | *2024*
- **Award**: Second Prize (Silver Medal)
- **Project**: Sim-to-Real RL Transfer
- **Role**: Algorithm Developer
- **Location**: London, UK
- **Description**: Developed domain randomization framework for RL policy transfer.

---

## 📜 Best Paper Awards

### **IEEE RA-L Best Paper Award** | *2025*
- **Journal**: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
- **Paper**: "Sim-to-Real Transfer of Reinforcement Learning Policies for Continuum Robot Manipulation"
- **Co-authors**: ZhangXu, Zhao J, Sun Q, et al.

### **ICRA Best Paper Finalist** | *2026*
- **Conference**: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
- **Paper**: "Learning-Based Adaptive Control for Continuum Robots Under Uncertainty"
- **Co-authors**: ZhangXu, Li M, Wang F

---

## 🎖️ Other Honors

### **Outstanding Graduate Student** | *2025*
- Tianjin University
- Recognized for academic excellence and research contributions
- 50 recipients selected from 2000+ students

### **Excellent Student Leader** | *2024*
- School of Mechanical Engineering, Tianjin University
- Leadership in robotics research team

### **Best Poster Presentation** | *2024*
- IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
- **Topic**: "A Novel Tendon-Driven Continuum Robot with Variable Stiffness"
- **Location**: Kyoto, Japan

---

## 📋 Academic Service

### **Journal Reviewer**
- IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO) - 2025-Present
- Soft Robotics - 2025-Present
- IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) - 2024-Present

### **Conference Reviewer**
- ICRA 2026, 2025
- IROS 2025, 2024
- IEEE CASE 2025

### **Conference Volunteer**
- IEEE ICRA 2024, London, UK
- Role: Session Chair for "Continuum Robots" session

---

## 🔬 Research Focus

My research lies at the intersection of **robotics** and **machine learning**, with a focus on:

1. **Continuum Robotics** - Modeling, control, and motion planning for soft/continuum robots
2. **Reinforcement Learning** - Deep RL for robotic manipulation and locomotion
3. **Motion Planning** - Trajectory optimization in constrained environments
4. **Sim-to-Real Transfer** - Bridging the gap between simulation and real-world deployment

Page._content:
# 🛠️ Projects

> 💡 **Note**: Click on **[Demo]** for video, **[Code]** for GitHub repo.

---

## 🔬 Research Projects

### **Continuum Robot Basketball Shooting** | *2026 - Present*

**Reinforcement Learning for Continuum Robot Motion Planning**

![Basketball RL](/images/projects/basketball-rl/thumbnail.jpg)

- **Role**: Lead Researcher
- **Tech Stack**: MuJoCo, PyTorch, Python, ROS
- **Description**: 
  - Developed RL-based control framework for continuum robot basketball shooting
  - Designed novel reward function for accurate shooting trajectory
  - Achieved 92% success rate in simulation from 3m distance
- **Output**: 1 conference paper (IROS 2026), 1 journal paper (under review)
- **[Code](https://github.com/Prologue-Z/continuum-basketball-rl)** | **[Demo]** | **[Paper]**

---

### **PhD Thesis Writing Assistant** | *2026 - Present*

**AI-Powered Academic Writing Tool**

- **Role**: Developer
- **Tech Stack**: Python, LLM, MCP
- **Description**:
  - Built multi-agent system for thesis writing assistance
  - Implemented literature review, writing, and formatting agents
  - Supports real-time collaboration and version control
- **Output**: Open-source project
- **[Code]** | **[Demo]**

---

### **Continuum Robot Modeling & Control** | *2024 - 2026*

**Kinematic and Dynamic Modeling for Soft Robots**

- **Role**: PhD Researcher
- **Tech Stack**: MATLAB, Python, MuJoCo
- **Description**:
  - Developed kinematic model for multi-segment continuum robots using Cosserat rod theory
  - Implemented model predictive control for trajectory tracking
  - Achieved <2mm positioning error in simulation
- **Output**: 2 journal papers (Soft Robotics 2026, IEEE T-RO 2026), 1 patent
- **[Paper]** | **[Video]**

---

### **Sim-to-Real RL Transfer** | *2024 - 2025*

**Domain Randomization for Continuum Robot Manipulation**

- **Role**: Researcher
- **Tech Stack**: PyTorch, Isaac Gym, Domain Randomization
- **Description**:
  - Developed sim-to-real transfer framework for RL policies
  - Implemented domain randomization techniques
  - Achieved 85% success rate on real robot
- **Output**: 1 journal paper (IEEE RA-L 2025)
- **[Paper]** | **[Code]** | **[Video]**

---

### **Cable-Driven Continuum Robot for Surgery** | *2024 - 2025*

**Design and Fabrication of Surgical Robot**

- **Role**: Mechanical Designer
- **Tech Stack**: SolidWorks, 3D Printing, Cable Actuation
- **Description**:
  - Designed 900mm cable-driven continuum robot with 6 DoF
  - Developed tendon-driven mechanism for minimally invasive surgery
  - Validated on phantom tissue models
- **Output**: 1 journal paper (Bioinspiration & Biomimetics 2025), 1 patent
- **[Paper]** | **[Video]**

---

### **Collision-Free Path Planning** | *2023 - 2024*

**Deep Learning for Dynamic Environment Navigation**

- **Role**: Algorithm Developer
- **Tech Stack**: Python, Deep Learning, CUDA
- **Description**:
  - Developed real-time collision avoidance algorithm
  - Implemented deep learning-based path planning
  - Achieved 120Hz planning frequency
- **Output**: 1 journal paper (IEEE T-MRB 2024)
- **[Paper]** | **[Code]**

---

### **FBG-Based Shape Estimation** | *2023 - 2024*

**Shape Sensing for Continuum Robots**

- **Role**: Perception Engineer
- **Tech Stack**: Python, PyTorch, FBG Sensors
- **Description**:
  - Developed deep learning-based shape reconstruction algorithm
  - Implemented Fiber Bragg Grating sensor data processing
  - Achieved <1.5mm reconstruction accuracy
- **Output**: 1 conference paper (ROBIO 2024)
- **[Paper]** | **[Code]**

---

## 💻 Open Source Projects
